tasks.title: 📋 Tag Reference
tasks.description:
**Urgency Levels:**
🔴 URGENT - Problems, complaints, billing, health concerns
🟡 ACTION - Client waiting on a response or deliverable
🟢 CHECK-IN - Routine follow-up, no pressure
⚪ MONITOR - You messaged last, watching for reply

**Context Tags:**
`billing` - Payment/subscription issues
`nutrition` - Macros, meal plans, food questions
`training` - Program, exercises, form, equipment
`adherence` - Compliance, consistency, motivation
`scheduling` - Calls, appointments, timezone
`medical` - Injury, illness, recovery, health
`onboarding` - New client setup, first week
`personal` - Life stuff, rapport, check-in
`deliverable` - Meal plan, program, recipe pack to send
`escalation` - Needs Torin or external action

tasks.title: 🔴 Shane Benson - Billing dispute
tasks.description:
**Urgency:** 🔴 URGENT

**Their message (Mar 27):**
> Torin, I saw that there was another transaction on my account today. I already paid $333.33 in December, January, and in early March. I don't know why that would've occurred since we only agreed to a three month deal.

**Context:** Inactive client charged a 4th month. He tagged Torin directly.

**Draft reply:**
```
Hey Shane, I just saw this. I'll flag it with Torin now and get it sorted for you. Sorry about that.
```

**Action needed:** Flag to Torin first, then respond.
